item.title: Thank for all of the support this year!рЯМµWent from 10k to 82k ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Thank for all of the support this year!рЯМµWent from 10k to 82k followersрЯ§ѓ So just to show a little gratitude you can find the lesson and TAB for this solo free on my Patreon (link in bio)! Just search for вАЭCountry solo in A7 #2вАЭ Thank you and I wish you a happy new guitar year!рЯ§† And for my new years resolution - IвАЩll try to look a bit more happy when I playрЯШРвАҐвАҐвАҐ#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking
